ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Continued To Mar-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Chan appeared by zoom for Mildred Wong (Petitioner/Beneficiary).

Mr. Chan stated that the only issue is the Franchise Tax Board issue, that the Hong Kong stock is all done and is now in this estate, that the stock was held in Philip Wong's name and that it was transferred to Mildred Wong. The Court stated that this is incorrect, that it's a distribution, that it should have gone into the estate and informed Mr. Wong that he will have a problem going forward. Mr. Chan stated that he had no control over how the Hong Kong stocks were released. The Court noted that there is no inventory and appraisal. Mr. Chan stated that they are ready to file the inventory and appraisal within two weeks. The Court informed Mr. Chan that he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration and provide a proposed order. Mr. Chan stated that the stock was worth $500,000.00 and that it is in the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to March 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is also set for March 2, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Continued To Jan-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert Chan appearing via Zoom for Petitioner.

The Court stated this matter is on calendar for status on close of estate and that nothing has happened since letters were issued. Mr. Chan stated the estate is distributed through a living trust except for a Hong Kong company stock holding which the Hong Kong lawyer needed the client to get letters testamentary, and his client has successfully gotten those stocks. The Court stated that it needs a petition to close in order to know the status of the estate. Mr. Chan asked if he can request a dismissal, and that this is an ancillary estate. The Court stated it does not know what counsel will need to do if there are no assets to be addressed. The status on close of estate is continued to December 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an appropriate petition on status of estate to be filed at least one week prior.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
